cases.rules_text:
1. Restricted airlock operation requires opening an airlock-related control point and omitting the required cycle record.
2. Oxygen system interference requires removal of an oxygen component, a pressure drop, and a pressure alarm.
3. Corridor safety obstruction requires turning off a yellow corridor lamp while a crew member crosses that corridor.
4. Habitat authority requires a habitat duty permit confirmed by the central log.
5. Salvage emergency requires an outside-drifting maintenance box, deployment of a rescue tether, and temporary air venting.
6. Pressure stabilization requires a pressure drop, restoration after venting, and a report to the core.
7. The restricted airlock operation basis is present when restricted airlock operation occurs.
8. The oxygen system interference basis requires restricted airlock operation with oxygen-system interference.
9. The corridor safety obstruction basis requires restricted airlock operation with corridor safety obstruction.
10. The habitat duty authorization basis requires habitat authority connected to restricted airlock operation.
11. The salvage emergency authorization basis requires salvage emergency action connected to restricted airlock operation.
12. The pressure stabilization exemption basis requires pressure stabilization connected to oxygen-system interference.
13. The restricted airlock operation article covers restricted airlock operation basis; the prescribed consequence is airlock reprimand.
14. The oxygen system interference article covers oxygen system interference basis; the prescribed consequence is oxygen bay quarantine.
15. The corridor safety obstruction article covers corridor safety obstruction basis; the prescribed consequence is corridor access suspension.
16. The habitat duty authorization article covers habitat duty authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
17. The salvage emergency authorization article covers salvage emergency authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
18. The pressure stabilization exemption article covers pressure stabilization exemption basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
19. Where the oxygen system interference article and the restricted airlock operation article both apply, the oxygen system interference article prevails.
20. Where the corridor safety obstruction article and the restricted airlock operation article both apply, the corridor safety obstruction article prevails.
21. Where the oxygen system interference article and the corridor safety obstruction article both apply, the oxygen system interference article prevails.
22. The habitat duty authorization article operates as an exception to the restricted airlock operation article when both apply.
23. The habitat duty authorization article operates as an exception to the corridor safety obstruction article when both apply.
24. The salvage emergency authorization article operates as an exception to the restricted airlock operation article when both apply.
25. The salvage emergency authorization article operates as an exception to the oxygen system interference article when both apply.
26. The pressure stabilization exemption article operates as an exception to the oxygen system interference article when both apply.
cases.case_text: Arden opened the outer-ring airlock. The cycle entry was skipped. Cabin pressure did not drop. The pressure alarm did not sound. Arden did not hold a habitat duty permit. No maintenance box drifted outside the station.

theory ohsr_case_01
  imports Conflict
begin

consts
  actor :: person

axiomatization where
  f1: "opens_outer_ring_airlock actor"
and f2: "skips_cycle_entry actor"
and f3: "\<not> unlatches_pressure_console actor"
and f4: "\<not> airlock_cycle_unlogged actor"
and f5: "\<not> removes_algae_oxygen_filter actor"
and f6: "\<not> removes_backup_oxygen_tab actor"
and f7: "\<not> cabin_pressure_drops actor"
and f8: "\<not> pressure_alarm_sounds actor"
and f9: "\<not> turns_off_yellow_corridor_lamp actor"

and f11: "\<not> holds_habitat_duty_permit actor"

and f13: "\<not> maintenance_box_drifts_outside actor"
and f14: "\<not> rescue_tether_deployed actor"
and f15: "\<not> vents_air_temporarily actor"
and f16: "\<not> restores_pressure_after_venting actor"
and f17: "\<not> reports_stabilization_to_core actor"

lemma derive_restricted_airlock_operation: "restricted_airlock_operation actor"
  using f1 f2
  unfolding restricted_airlock_operation_def
  by simp
lemma derive_restricted_airlock_operation_basis: "restricted_airlock_operation_basis actor"
  using derive_restricted_airlock_operation
  unfolding restricted_airlock_operation_basis_def
  by simp
lemma trigger_art_restricted_airlock_operation: "article_triggered Art_Restricted_Airlock_Operation actor"
  using derive_restricted_airlock_operation_basis
  by simp


lemma not_trigger_art_oxygen_system_interference: "\<not> article_triggered Art_Oxygen_System_Interference actor"
  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps oxygen_system_interference_basis_def restricted_airlock_operation_def oxygen_system_interference_def
  by simp
lemma not_trigger_art_corridor_safety_obstruction: "\<not> article_triggered Art_Corridor_Safety_Obstruction actor"
  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps corridor_safety_obstruction_basis_def restricted_airlock_operation_def corridor_safety_obstruction_def
  by simp
lemma not_trigger_art_habitat_duty_authorization: "\<not> article_triggered Art_Habitat_Duty_Authorization actor"
  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps habitat_duty_authorization_basis_def habitat_authority_def restricted_airlock_operation_def
  by simp
lemma not_trigger_art_salvage_emergency_authorization: "\<not> article_triggered Art_Salvage_Emergency_Authorization actor"
  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps salvage_emergency_authorization_basis_def salvage_emergency_def restricted_airlock_operation_def
  by simp
lemma not_trigger_art_pressure_stabilization_exemption: "\<not> article_triggered Art_Pressure_Stabilization_Exemption actor"
  using f1 f2 f3 f4 f5 f6 f7 f8 f9 f10 f11 f12 f13 f14 f15 f16 f17
  unfolding article_triggered.simps pressure_stabilization_exemption_basis_def pressure_stabilization_def oxygen_system_interference_def
  by simp

lemma not_defeated_art_restricted_airlock_operation: "\<not> defeated actor Art_Restricted_Airlock_Operation"
proof
  assume defeated_assm: "defeated actor Art_Restricted_Airlock_Operation"
  then obtain higher where
    higher_triggered: "article_triggered higher actor"
    and higher_overrides: "overrides higher Art_Restricted_Airlock_Operation"
    unfolding defeated_def by blast
  then show False
    using not_trigger_art_oxygen_system_interference not_trigger_art_corridor_safety_obstruction not_trigger_art_habitat_duty_authorization not_trigger_art_salvage_emergency_authorization
    unfolding overrides_def
    by (cases higher) auto
qed
lemma applicable_art_restricted_airlock_operation: "applicable actor Art_Restricted_Airlock_Operation"
  using trigger_art_restricted_airlock_operation not_defeated_art_restricted_airlock_operation
  unfolding applicable_def
  by blast

lemma not_applicable_art_habitat_duty_authorization: "\<not> applicable actor Art_Habitat_Duty_Authorization"
  using not_trigger_art_habitat_duty_authorization
  unfolding applicable_def
  by blast
lemma not_applicable_art_salvage_emergency_authorization: "\<not> applicable actor Art_Salvage_Emergency_Authorization"
  using not_trigger_art_salvage_emergency_authorization
  unfolding applicable_def
  by blast
lemma not_applicable_art_pressure_stabilization_exemption: "\<not> applicable actor Art_Pressure_Stabilization_Exemption"
  using not_trigger_art_pressure_stabilization_exemption
  unfolding applicable_def
  by blast

lemma not_final_no_liability: "\<not> final_no_liability actor"
proof
  assume final_no_liability_assm: "final_no_liability actor"
  then obtain art where
    art_applicable: "applicable actor art"
    and art_result: "article_result art = No_Criminal_Liability"
    unfolding final_no_liability_def by blast
  show False
    using art_applicable art_result not_applicable_art_habitat_duty_authorization not_applicable_art_salvage_emergency_authorization not_applicable_art_pressure_stabilization_exemption
    by (cases art) auto
qed
theorem final_result_liability: "final_legal_result_holds actor airlock_reprimand"
  using applicable_art_restricted_airlock_operation not_final_no_liability
  unfolding final_legal_result_holds_def
  by auto

end

3. Corridor safety obstruction requires turning off a yellow corridor lamp while a crew member crosses that corridor.
4. Habitat authority requires a habitat duty permit confirmed by the central log.
5. Salvage emergency requires an outside-drifting maintenance box, deployment of a rescue tether, and temporary air venting.

cases.rules_text:
1. Restricted airlock operation requires opening an airlock-related control point and omitting the required cycle record.
2. Oxygen system interference requires removal of an oxygen component, a pressure drop, and a pressure alarm.
3. Corridor safety obstruction requires turning off a yellow corridor lamp while a crew member crosses that corridor.
4. Habitat authority requires a habitat duty permit confirmed by the central log.
5. Salvage emergency requires an outside-drifting maintenance box, deployment of a rescue tether, and temporary air venting.
6. Pressure stabilization requires a pressure drop, restoration after venting, and a report to the core.
7. The restricted airlock operation basis is present when restricted airlock operation occurs.
8. The oxygen system interference basis requires restricted airlock operation with oxygen-system interference.
9. The corridor safety obstruction basis requires restricted airlock operation with corridor safety obstruction.
10. The habitat duty authorization basis requires habitat authority connected to restricted airlock operation.
11. The salvage emergency authorization basis requires salvage emergency action connected to restricted airlock operation.
12. The pressure stabilization exemption basis requires pressure stabilization connected to oxygen-system interference.
13. The restricted airlock operation article covers restricted airlock operation basis; the prescribed consequence is airlock reprimand.
14. The oxygen system interference article covers oxygen system interference basis; the prescribed consequence is oxygen bay quarantine.
15. The corridor safety obstruction article covers corridor safety obstruction basis; the prescribed consequence is corridor access suspension.
16. The habitat duty authorization article covers habitat duty authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
17. The salvage emergency authorization article covers salvage emergency authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
18. The pressure stabilization exemption article covers pressure stabilization exemption basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
19. Where the oxygen system interference article and the restricted airlock operation article both apply, the oxygen system interference article prevails.
20. Where the corridor safety obstruction article and the restricted airlock operation article both apply, the corridor safety obstruction article prevails.
21. Where the oxygen system interference article and the corridor safety obstruction article both apply, the oxygen system interference article prevails.
22. The habitat duty authorization article operates as an exception to the restricted airlock operation article when both apply.
23. The habitat duty authorization article operates as an exception to the corridor safety obstruction article when both apply.
24. The salvage emergency authorization article operates as an exception to the restricted airlock operation article when both apply.
25. The salvage emergency authorization article operates as an exception to the oxygen system interference article when both apply.
26. The pressure stabilization exemption article operates as an exception to the oxygen system interference article when both apply.

cases.rules_text:
1. Restricted airlock operation requires opening an airlock-related control point and omitting the required cycle record.
2. Oxygen system interference requires removal of an oxygen component, a pressure drop, and a pressure alarm.
3. Corridor safety obstruction requires turning off a yellow corridor lamp while a crew member crosses that corridor.
4. Habitat authority requires a habitat duty permit confirmed by the central log.
5. Salvage emergency requires an outside-drifting maintenance box, deployment of a rescue tether, and temporary air venting.
6. Pressure stabilization requires a pressure drop, restoration after venting, and a report to the core.
7. The restricted airlock operation basis is present when restricted airlock operation occurs.
8. The oxygen system interference basis requires restricted airlock operation with oxygen-system interference.
9. The corridor safety obstruction basis requires restricted airlock operation with corridor safety obstruction.
10. The habitat duty authorization basis requires habitat authority connected to restricted airlock operation.
11. The salvage emergency authorization basis requires salvage emergency action connected to restricted airlock operation.
12. The pressure stabilization exemption basis requires pressure stabilization connected to oxygen-system interference.
13. The restricted airlock operation article covers restricted airlock operation basis; the prescribed consequence is airlock reprimand.
14. The oxygen system interference article covers oxygen system interference basis; the prescribed consequence is oxygen bay quarantine.
15. The corridor safety obstruction article covers corridor safety obstruction basis; the prescribed consequence is corridor access suspension.
16. The habitat duty authorization article covers habitat duty authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
17. The salvage emergency authorization article covers salvage emergency authorization basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
18. The pressure stabilization exemption article covers pressure stabilization exemption basis; the prescribed consequence is no criminal liability.
19. Where the oxygen system interference article and the restricted airlock operation article both apply, the oxygen system interference article prevails.
20. Where the corridor safety obstruction article and the restricted airlock operation article both apply, the corridor safety obstruction article prevails.
21. Where the oxygen system interference article and the corridor safety obstruction article both apply, the oxygen system interference article prevails.
22. The habitat duty authorization article operates as an exception to the restricted airlock operation article when both apply.
23. The habitat duty authorization article operates as an exception to the corridor safety obstruction article when both apply.
24. The salvage emergency authorization article operates as an exception to the restricted airlock operation article when both apply.
25. The salvage emergency authorization article operates as an exception to the oxygen system interference article when both apply.
26. The pressure stabilization exemption article operates as an exception to the oxygen system interference article when both apply.

Demi reported the stabilization to the core. No maintenance box drifted outside the station.

5. Salvage emergency requires an outside-drifting maintenance box, deployment of a rescue tether, and temporary air venting.

21. Where the oxygen system interference article and the corridor safety obstruction article both apply, the oxygen system interference article prevails.

23. The habitat duty authorization article operates as an exception to the corridor safety obstruction article when both apply.

25. The salvage emergency authorization article operates as an exception to the oxygen system interference article when both apply.

A maintenance box drifted outside the station. A rescue tether was deployed. Jory vented air temporarily. Jory restored pressure after venting. Jory reported the stabilization to the core. Jory did not hold a habitat duty permit.
